Added_Other.name: FFlagWTTDontPerformOcclusionForOutsideOfRange
Added_Other.mechanism: Disables occlusion checks for objects that are too far away to be seen.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by reducing unnecessary calculations for distant objects.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagWTTDontPerformOcclusionForOutsideOfRange_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how visibility calculations are handled for objects outside a certain range.
Removed_Other.purpose: Boosts game performance by reducing unnecessary calculations for distant objects.

Added_Other.name: FFlagMakeupDontComposeSingleMakeupAsset
Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the composition of a single makeup asset into a combined appearance.
Added_Other.purpose: Gives players more flexibility in customizing their characters without automatic merging of makeup styles.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUnifyCaptures
Added_Other.mechanism: Standardizes how captures (like screenshots or recordings) are handled across the platform.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides a consistent experience for players when capturing and sharing their gameplay moments.

Added_World.name: FFlagWTTOcclusionUseMappedNearestTriangle
Added_World.mechanism: Uses a more efficient method to determine visibility of objects in 3D space.
Added_World.purpose: Reduces rendering load, leading to smoother gameplay and better frame rates.

Removed_Other.purpose: Makes applying makeup faster and more efficient for players customizing their avatars.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagUnifyCaptures_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Combines different capture systems into a single unified system.
Removed_Other.purpose: Streamlines the capture process, making it easier for developers to manage and use.

Removed_World.name: FFlagWTTOcclusionUseMappedNearestTriangle_Staged
Removed_World.mechanism: Uses a mapped nearest triangle algorithm for occlusion culling.
Removed_World.purpose: Enhances game performance by reducing the rendering of unseen objects.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUseConvexDecompV8Format_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Switches to a new format for breaking down complex shapes into simpler ones.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the performance and accuracy of 3D shapes in games.
